copy.title: Copy Table
copy.description: Copies the table above to the connection and database you pick below. Run the copy to create and fill the table on the target, or open it as a script to review the SQL first.
copy.field.dropExisting: Drop target table if it exists
copy.error.unsupported: Copy Table doesn't support the '{0}' engine yet (reads via information_schema; Postgres, MySQL and SQL Server only).
copy.error.noTarget: Pick a connection and database to copy to.
copy.error.notFound: Couldn't find a table named '{0}' on this connection.
copy.progress.creating: Creating the table on the target…
copy.progress.created: Created the table on the target.
copy.script.header: -- Copy of {0} -> {1}: run this on the target to create the table and insert {2} row(s).
copy.script.ambiguous: -- NOTE: more than one schema has a table by this name; scripted schema '{0}'. Adjust if needed.
copy.result.opened: Opened the copy script in a query tab on {0} — review it there and run when ready ({1} row(s)).
